message:
Pin Homebrew tap app token action

Pin the GitHub App token action in the Homebrew tap update job
to an immutable release commit. This keeps the workflow aligned
with the rest of the file and avoids using a mutable tag for the
token that pushes to the tap repo.

files.patch:
@@ -782,7 +782,7 @@ jobs:
           path: ${{ runner.temp }}/signed-pkg
       - name: Generate app token
         id: app-token
-        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
+        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@d72941d797fd3113feb6b93fd0dec494b13a2547  # v1.12.0
         with:
           app-id: ${{ vars.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_ID }}
           private-key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
